title: Working links in monday android app

posts.author: DanielFreund (Daniel Freund)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello, we use monday on PC and on tablet (Android) and we want to use the links in the android-app.
There we have shortcuts to our notebooks, files and team-websites. The app doesn´t support the links.
monday in the browser on the tablet works, but this is not very smooth.
Thank you!
